cross_scene_arcs.title: Pursuit of Truth Behind Brother's Death
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carter transitions from mourning to active investigation, defying warnings and gathering evidence to uncover the truth behind his brother Frank's death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: committed to northern investigation despite warnings
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: possesses actionable intelligence on Brumby and shifts to confrontation phase
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Brumby's full connection to Frank's death remains unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Vengeance and Retribution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carter enacts violent revenge on those involved in his brother's death, culminating in Eric's forced ingestion of whisky and disposal at sea.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: commits first confirmed killing in pursuit of justice
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: no longer actively pursuing vengeance, decides to discard weapon
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: risk of legal consequences or retaliation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Isolation and Emotional Withdrawal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carter remains emotionally and physically isolated throughout his journey, from mourning his brother to dying alone on the beach.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally isolated after final visit with brother
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carter is dead, body exposed to the sea
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: grief and mission end without resolution or companionship

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict with Northern Power Structure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carter's defiance of warnings escalates into direct confrontation with a hidden network involving Brumby, Eric, and ultimately Kinnear's conspiracy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: positioned as outsider within London power structure
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carter is mortally wounded by a sniper linked to Kinnear's conspiracy

cross_scene_arcs.title: Physical Confrontations and Loss of Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Brumby attempts to assert dominance through physical confrontation—first with Carter at home, then during a tense exchange over the film—but is repeatedly overpowered or assaulted, eroding his physical and symbolic authority.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: attempts to block and attack Carter in his home
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: punched by Carter and left isolated, though resolute in his actions
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: inability to defend himself or command respect through force

cross_scene_arcs.title: Strategic Manipulation and Desperation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Brumby shifts from direct confrontation to manipulation, offering Carter information and money to target Cyril Kinnear and justifying risky actions like showing the film, revealing his growing desperation to influence events without direct power.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: offers Carter $5,000 and blames Kinnear for Carter's brother's death
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carter rejects his justification and physically retaliates over the film
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: lack of credible leverage and continued isolation in his strategic position

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deteriorating Relationship with Carter
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Brumby's relationship with Carter devolves from hostile confrontation to instrumental overture and then to mutual antagonism, marked by physical violence and broken trust.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Brumby attacks Carter and is defeated
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carter punches Brumby for showing the film, rejecting his justifications
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: ongoing hostility and lack of cooperation despite shared interests

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalation of Hostility with Carter
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric's conflict with Carter intensifies from verbal confrontation to lethal retaliation and ends in Eric's violent death and disposal.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eric denies knowing Albert Swift and tries to maintain a respectable image under Carter's scrutiny.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eric is beaten unconscious and his body is dumped at sea, erased without ceremony.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eric's role in Frank's death is confirmed under duress, but no broader accountability follows.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Involvement in Criminal Power Structure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric transitions from a seemingly minor figure to an operative with authority in a criminal network, acting on behalf of Cyril, Sid, Gerald, and Kinnear.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eric's criminal past is implied while he maintains a chauffeur's uniform and denies connections.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eric relays messages for Kinnear and directs subordinates like Ray, embedded in a powerful hierarchy.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent of Eric's authority and responsibilities within the group remains unclear.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Flight and Physical Decline
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric's attempt to escape Carter deteriorates from flight to physical collapse as he becomes trapped and overtaken.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eric flees across the jetty upon spotting Carter with a shotgun.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eric is immobilized in mud, cornered and unable to resist as Carter approaches.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eric has no means of escape or assistance as his flight ends in capture.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Private Access to Kinnear
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric serves as a trusted messenger and is summoned for private discussion by Kinnear, indicating a close working relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eric delivers a phone message from Gerald Fletcher to Kinnear during a party.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Kinnear pulls Eric aside for a confidential conversation, signaling trust and operational importance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The content and purpose of Kinnear's private request remain undisclosed.
